summary: Verified bug fix for BTC Overview vs BTC Fractals prediction discrepancy. Both now show identical values ($151,866.95 for 365d). BTC is now default asset on Overview page, and Overview uses crossAsset view for BTC instead of hybrid.
passed_tests: BTC 365d on Overview shows $151,866.95 - matches BTC Fractals crossAsset value
BTC is default asset on Overview page (opens first)
Bitcoin tab is first/leftmost in asset selector
Overview uses crossAsset view for BTC (line 542: asset === 'dxy' ? 'hybrid' : 'crossAsset')
SPX on Overview works correctly - shows S&P 500 data with proper range
DXY on Overview works correctly - shows Dollar Index data with proper range (111-123)
Live prediction chart loads and displays data correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: BTC Overview now uses crossAsset view (not hybrid), showing same prediction as BTC Fractals page. Both show $151,866.95 for 365d horizon. BTC is now default asset on Overview.
